# restatement

**Type**

A Boolean value that indicates a line item contains a correction.

## Declaration

```swift
boolean restatement
```

## Discussion

Set this value to `true` to indicate the line item is restating a previously submitted line item, and contains corrections.



To report erroneously submitted line items, set both the `restatement` and [doc://org.swift.docc.ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/documentation/ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/erroneouslySubmitted] fields to `true`.

For more information on correcting previously submitted line items, see [doc://org.swift.docc.ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/documentation/ExternalPurchaseServerAPI/reportcorrections].

## Submitting corrections

- **erroneouslySubmitted**: A Boolean value that indicates whether a line item was submitted in error.

items.description: A Boolean value that indicates whether a line item was submitted in error.
